revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月廿六]][[zh:十二月廿六]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 26|qq=December 26}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 26''' is the 26th day of the month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}}, the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Enchō|ja|延長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enchō|1=Enchō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q97379316}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|928|en|928|qid=Q24297|lt=928|1=928}} {{ill|January 21|en|January 21|qid=Q2273|lt=January 21|1=January 21}}) – The Right Minister {{ill|Fujiwara no Tadahira|en|Fujiwara no Tadahira|qid=Q1397601|lt=Fujiwara Tadahei|1=Fujiwara no Tadahira}} presented the {{ill|Engishiki|en|Engishiki|qid=Q1342448|lt=Engishiki|1=Engishiki}}. * {{ill|Tengyō|en|Tengyō|qid=Q1327340|lt=Tenkei|1=Tengyō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|940|en|940|qid=Q23830|lt=940|1=940}} {{ill|February 6|en|February 6|qid=Q2320|lt=February 6|1=February 6}}) – The uprising of {{ill|Fujiwara no Sumitomo|en|Fujiwara no Sumitomo|qid=Q1187731|lt=Fujiwara Juntomo|1=Fujiwara no Sumitomo}} (the {{ill|Tengyō no Ran|en|Tengyō no Ran|qid=Q2975322|lt=Shōhei-Tenkei no Ran|1=Tengyō no Ran}}). * {{ill|Heiji|en|Heiji|qid=Q1193930|lt=Heiji|1=Heiji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1160|en|1160|qid=Q19662|lt=1160|1=1160}} {{ill|February 5|en|February 5|qid=Q2319|lt=February 5|1=February 5}}) – The {{ill|Heiji rebellion|en|Heiji rebellion|qid=Q944859|lt=Heiji Rebellion|1=Heiji rebellion}} ended with the victories of Taira no Norimori, Norimasa, and Kiyomori over Minamoto no Yoshitomo and Fujiwara Nobutada. * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|qid=Q1010103|lt=Bun'ei|1=Bun'ei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1266|en|1266|qid=Q5517|lt=1266|1=1266}} {{ill|February 2|en|February 2|qid=Q2313|lt=February 2|1=February 2}}) – Fujiwara no Tameie and others compiled the second edition of the {{ill|Shokukokin Wakashū|en|Shokukokin Wakashū|qid=Q1143045|lt=Shokokugoshū|1=Shokukokin Wakashū}}. * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|qid=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1801|en|1801|qid=Q6877|lt=1801|1=1801}} {{ill|February 9|en|February 9|qid=Q2324|lt=February 9|1=February 9}}) – {{ill|Inō Tadataka|en|Inō Tadataka|qid=Q1240937|lt=Ino Tadataka|1=Inō Tadataka}} presented approximate survey maps of the southeastern coast of Ezo and the Ōshū Kaidō to the bakufu—the first empirically measured maps in Japan. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|February 4|en|February 4|qid=Q2318|lt=February 4|1=February 4}}) – The newly established {{ill|Ministry of Law|en|Ministry of Law|qid=Q6867357|lt=Judicial Ministry|1=Ministry of Law}} set up Japan’s first modern court, the Tokyo Court. == Births == * {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun|1=Tenmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q21096812}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1543|en|1543|qid=Q6523|lt=1543|1=1543}} {{ill|January 31|en|January 31|qid=Q2289|lt=January 31|1=January 31}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}}, the first {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the Tokugawa shogunate (died {{ill|1616|en|1616|qid=Q6788|lt=1616|1=1616}}) <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://shuchi.php.co.jp/rekishikaido/detail/3791|title=天下は天下の天下なり…徳川家康の遺言|work=WEB 歴史街道|date=2017-04-17|accessdate=2021-03-02|qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1836|en|1836|qid=Q7601|lt=1836|1=1836}} {{ill|February 12|en|February 12|qid=Q2336|lt=February 12|1=February 12}}) – {{ill|Godai Tomoatsu|en|Godai Tomoatsu|qid=Q1000600|lt=Godai Tomoatsu|1=Godai Tomoatsu}}, a samurai of the Satsuma Domain and businessman (died {{ill|1885|en|1885|qid=Q7821|lt=1885|1=1885}}). * (Tenpō) 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1844|en|1844|qid=Q7633|lt=1844|1=1844}} {{ill|February 14|en|February 14|qid=Q2332|lt=February 14|1=February 14}}) – {{ill|Kataoka Kenkichi|ja|片岡健吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kataoka Kenkichi|1=Kenkichi Kataoka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6274858}}, a politician (died {{ill|1903|en|1903|qid=Q2045|lt=1903|1=1903}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1863|en|1863|qid=Q7701|lt=1863|1=1863}} {{ill|February 14|en|February 14|qid=Q2332|lt=February 14|1=February 14}}) – {{ill|Okakura Kakuzō|en|Okakura Kakuzō|qid=Q942995|lt=Okakura Tenshin|1=Okakura Kakuzō}}, an art critic and educator (died {{ill|1913|en|1913|qid=Q2080|lt=1913|1=1913}}). * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|qid=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} {{ill|January 23|en|January 23|qid=Q2276|lt=January 23|1=January 23}}) – {{ill|Yamaji Aizan|ja|山路愛山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamaji Aizan|1=Yamaji Aizan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11470965}}, a critic and historian (died {{ill|1917|en|1917|qid=Q2092|lt=1917|1=1917}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Shenlong (disambiguation)|en|Shenlong (disambiguation)|qid=Q1540702|lt=Shenlong (Tang)|1=Shenlong (disambiguation)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|706|en|706|qid=Q23506|lt=706|1=706}} {{ill|January 15|en|January 15|qid=Q2260|lt=January 15|1=January 15}}) – {{ill|Wu Zetian|ja|則天武后|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Zetian|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 武則天|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 武則天|1=Wu Zetian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9738}}, Empress of the Tang; also known as Empress Dowager Wu, she was the consort of Emperor Gaozong and later ruled in her own right (born {{ill|624|en|624|qid=Q33247|lt=624|1=624}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|25|12|27|11|26|1|12|1226|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|12月26日 (旧暦)|version=96967187|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[cdo:12 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:December 26 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 12월 26일]] [[ja:12月26日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十二月廿六]]
[[ar:December 26 (Lunisolar)]]
